title: cymbopogon circinnatus
intro: Cymbopogon circinnatus, also known as East Indian lemongrass, is a tropical grass native to India and Sri Lanka, belonging to the Poaceae family. The medicinal properties of Cymbopogon circinnatus include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of this plant include reducing stress and anxiety, relieving menstrual cramps, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues and fever. Cymbopogon circinnatus is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
